analysis_result: 12/19 (63.2%) of atypical NF WES samples have NF1 somatic mutations (non-synonymous classes). Reported 60%.
discrepancy_analysis: Model result 63.2% is within +/-10% of reported 60% (relative diff ~5.3%). Verified by loading MOESM5 MAF (Supplementary Table 2) and MOESM4 clinical data: 20 Atypical_NF rows have WES='X'; 19 map to Tumor_{WES label} barcodes present in the MAF (Tumor_2178 is absent from MAF). Among non-synonymous variants (Missense, Nonsense, Frame_Shift_Del/Ins, In_Frame_Del/Ins, Splice_Site, Translation_Start_Site, Nonstop), 12/19 ANF samples carry NF1 mutations = 63.2%. Also 12/19 if silent variants are included. Paper's '60%' is a rounded figure consistent with ~12/20 (if Tumor_2178 were included and WT) or slightly rounded from 63%.
